steps.title: Subtract matching terms
steps.content:
The expression $x+6$ appears on both sides. Subtract $8(x+6)$ from both sides.
$$9(x+6)=8(x+6)+74$$
$$x+6=74$$

steps.title: Use the requested value
steps.content: The question asks directly for $x+6$, which the equation already gives as $74$. The answer is C.
